messages.text: therapist retired after seeing those black socks and that wooden bar
nah he saw the control and said yeah im done
u saw some straps and folded this fast
you holding that bar like hr gave you power of attorney
i always had power, bar is just decoration
you say that like it is new

self control crying over pilates equipment is kinda crazy

im, just want visitation rights, supervised by you ofc
supervised, you would not last one class with me?
